question: The line chart shows revenue by year from 2018 to 2021, with the last point extending beyond the visible y-axis range. Which statement is accurate based on the chart?

options.A: Revenue increased every year from 2018 to 2021.
options.B: Revenue in 2020 and 2021 is the same.
options.C: Revenue in 2021 is higher than in 2020, but the exact amount is not fully visible because it exceeds the chart’s y-axis range.
options.D: Revenue in 2018 was higher than in 2019.

explanation: The y-axis maximum is set below the data maximum, so the top bars are clipped and appear equal; the true values cannot be compared from the chart alone.
